    S

    Service Provider Interface (SPI) - Section in module dk.tij.registermaschine.core
     
    set() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.Pipeline.ParseStage
    Returns the value of the set record component.
    set() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.Pipeline.TokenStage
    Returns the value of the set record component.
    setContext(IExecutionContext) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContextListener
    Assigns the execution context that this listener observes.
    setCustomRootPath(Path) - Static method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.CoreConfigParser
    Sets a custom root path for user-editable configuration files.
    setExitCode(byte) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Sets the exit code produced by the program.
    setExitCode(byte) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Sets the exit code of the program and notifies listeners.
    setFlags(boolean, boolean, boolean) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Updates the status flags of the machine.
    setFlags(boolean, boolean, boolean) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Updates the machine status flags.
    setGlobalInstructionSet(IInstructionSet) - Static method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.Pipeline
    Sets the global IInstructionSet used by pipeline methods ending in `WithGlobal`.
    setInputRequestCallback(Runnable) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Sets a callback that will be executed whenever input is requested.
    setProgram(ICompiledProgram) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.Executor
    Sets the compiled program that should be executed.
    setProgrammeCounter(int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Sets the programme counter to a specific instruction index.
    setProgrammeCounter(int) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Sets the programme counter to a new value.
    setRegister(int, int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Sets the value of the specified register.
    setRegister(int, int) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Updates the value of a register.
    setSpeed(int) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.Executor
    Sets the execution speed of the Registermaschine.
    SettingsParser - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.parsers
     
    SettingsParser() - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.config.internal.parsers.SettingsParser
     
    shouldExecute(IExecutionContext) - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.api.AbstractInstruction
    Determines whether this instruction should execute in the current context.
    snapshotAndClearDirty() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Creates a snapshot of the current execution state.
    snapshotAndClearDirty() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Creates an ExecutionSnapshot containing the current execution state and all registers that have changed since previous snapshot.
    startExecution() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Advances the start of program execution.
    startExecution() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Marks the execution context as running and notifies listeners that execution has started.
    step() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Advances the programme counter by one instruction.
    step() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Advances the programme counter by one instruction.
    stop() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.Executor
    Stops the execution loop.
    stopExecution() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.api.IExecutionContext
    Signals that program execution has stopped.
    stopExecution() - Method in class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.runtime.ConcreteExecutionContext
    Stops execution and notifies all listeners.
    SubtractionInstruction - Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions
    Instruction handler that performs integer subtraction.
    SubtractionInstruction(byte, int, ICondition) - Constructor for class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.instructions.SubtractionInstruction
     
    SyntaxErrorException - Exception Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.core.error
    Thrown when there is a syntax error in the source code.
    SyntaxErrorException(String) - Constructor for exception class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.error.SyntaxErrorException
     
    syntaxTree() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.core.compilation.Pipeline.ParseStage
    Returns the value of the syntaxTree record component.
